# NeoFidu

> NeoFidu is a Swiss online fiduciary (fiduciaire en ligne) serving French-speaking Switzerland. We provide tax return preparation, company incorporation, and accounting services for individuals and businesses across 6 cantons: Vaud (VD), Geneva (GE), Valais (VS), Fribourg (FR), Neuchatel (NE), and Jura (JU).

Key information:

- NeoFidu operates exclusively in French-speaking Switzerland (Suisse romande)
- Tax returns start from CHF 89 for individuals, CHF 149 with optimization
- Company creation services from CHF 490
- All services are delivered online with certified Swiss fiduciary experts
- The site is primarily in French, with English versions available for company and municipality pages

## Services

- [Tax returns for individuals](https://neofidu.ch/particuliers): Personal tax return preparation with cantonal expertise (VD, GE, VS, FR, NE, JU)
- [Services for businesses](https://neofidu.ch/entreprises): Company creation, accounting, VAT registration, and corporate tax returns
- [Services for associations and foundations](https://neofidu.ch/associations-fondations): Specialized services for non-profit organizations
- [Pricing](https://neofidu.ch/tarifs): Transparent pricing for all services
- [Submit a request](https://neofidu.ch/demande): Online form to request a quote or service

## Free Tools

- [Tax simulator](https://neofidu.ch/simulateur-impots): Calculate your taxes by canton and municipality with real municipal coefficients
- [Salary simulator](https://neofidu.ch/simulateur-salaire): Gross-to-net salary calculator with Swiss social contributions (AVS, AI, APG, AC, LPP)
- [Company Observatory](https://neofidu.ch/observatoire): Database of 200,000+ companies in French-speaking Switzerland with sector classification, legal form, and headquarters data
- [Municipality database](https://neofidu.ch/communes): 670 municipalities across 6 cantons with tax coefficients, population, density, real estate prices, and neighboring municipality comparisons

## Canton Pages

- [Vaud (VD)](https://neofidu.ch/cantons/vd): Tax information for canton Vaud
- [Geneva (GE)](https://neofidu.ch/cantons/ge): Tax information for canton Geneva
- [Valais (VS)](https://neofidu.ch/cantons/vs): Tax information for canton Valais
- [Fribourg (FR)](https://neofidu.ch/cantons/fr): Tax information for canton Fribourg
- [Neuchatel (NE)](https://neofidu.ch/cantons/ne): Tax information for canton Neuchatel
- [Jura (JU)](https://neofidu.ch/cantons/ju): Tax information for canton Jura

## Blog

- [Blog](https://neofidu.ch/blog): Articles on Swiss taxation, company creation, accounting, and financial planning in French-speaking Switzerland

## English Pages

- [Company pages (EN)](https://neofidu.ch/en/observatoire/): English version of individual company pages from the Observatory
- [Municipality pages (EN)](https://neofidu.ch/en/communes/): English version of municipality pages with tax rates and local data

## Optional

- [Homepage](https://neofidu.ch): Main landing page with overview of all services
- [Request tracking](https://neofidu.ch/suivi): Track the status of your tax return or service request
